question: I'm getting DTC P0117 on the MWS150-A. What does it mean and what is the diagnostic procedure?
golden_summary: DTC P0117 indicates the coolant temperature sensor (冷卻液溫度感知器) detected a ground short circuit (搭鐵短路); the associated diagnostic code is 06 and the procedure must be performed in 引擎冷機 (engine cold) state. The sequence: (1) check the coolant temperature sensor connector for proper connection and pin condition, (2) check the ECU connector the same way, (3) test continuity of the wiring harness — for P0117 specifically, between the coolant temperature sensor connector and ground on the 綠色 / 紅色 (green/red) wire; if continuity is detected, replace the wire harness. If wiring is OK, (4) verify the sensor mounting, (5) execute diagnostic mode 06 with the engine cold and check whether the displayed temperature approaches ambient — if it does not, replace the coolant temperature sensor; (6) if the fault persists, replace the ECU per page 8-101. Finally erase the DTC using the 山葉診斷工具 (Yamaha diagnostic tool) and confirm the engine warning lamp turns off.

golden_citations.quote: [P0117] 冷卻液溫度感知器:偵測到搭鐵短路。
在引擎冷機狀態進行此程序。
冷卻液溫度感知器接頭與搭鐵之間:綠色 / 紅色 – 搭鐵

notes: human-authored 2026-04-26 from full read of section p0117-p0118 (12,010 chars); all 4 citations and 5 must_contain strings verified as whitespace-normalised substrings of source; 2 must_not_contain hallucination guards verified absent; expected_tool_trace pending Step-5 calibration against live qwen3.5:27b-q8_0 agent run.

question: What does DTC P062F mean on the MWS150-A, and how do I diagnose it?
golden_summary: DTC P062F indicates the ECU detected an error reading or writing the EEPROM (EEPROM 故障代碼編號:讀取或寫入 EEPROM 時偵測到錯誤). The associated diagnostic code is 60 — execute diagnostic mode 60 to identify the sub-fault: 00 means no fault was detected (if P062F is shown despite this, the ECU itself is faulty), 01 indicates a CO 濃度調整 (CO concentration adjustment) EEPROM data error, 11 indicates an ISC (惰轉轉速控制 / idle speed control) learning-value EEPROM error, and 12 indicates an 含氧量回饋 (oxygen feedback) learning-value EEPROM error. For sub-fault 01, change the CO concentration and rewrite the EEPROM per page 3-10, then turn the main switch OFF. For 11 or 12, simply switch the main switch OFF. After repair, re-run diagnostic mode 60: if it still shows 'Malfunction', the ECU is faulty and must be replaced per page 8-101. Finally erase the DTC using the 山葉診斷工具 (Yamaha diagnostic tool) and confirm the engine warning lamp turns off.

golden_citations.quote: EEPROM 故障代碼編號:讀取或寫入 EEPROM 時偵測到錯誤。
變更 CO 濃度,並重寫

notes: human-authored 2026-04-27 from full read of section p062f (21,078 chars — the largest DTC section in the manual; note the parser captures content for P062F, P1601, P2195, and P2645 under this single H4). 4 citations and 5 must_contain strings verified as substrings; 2 must_not_contain guards verified absent. expected_tool_trace pending Step-5 calibration.
